channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Corporate perks are being scaled back
item.description: The era of expanding workplace perks is ending. Benefits like paid parental leave and retirement matching are being reduced or eliminated.

item.title: Farmers grow increasingly desperate as energy and fertilizer costs rise
item.description: Farmers across the Midwest face mounting financial pressure this planting season as the Iran conflict drives up diesel and fertilizer prices.

item.title: Supreme Court blocks Virginia redistricting effort
item.description: The Supreme Court denied an emergency request from Virginia Democrats to revive their chances of redrawing the state's congressional maps before November.

item.title: ChatGPT era leads to surge in top grades
item.description: Some college classes see a boom in A grades, many with AI assistance, as universities already faced grade inflation concerns.
